query:
SELECT l.id, l.title, m.title as module_title 
FROM lessons l 
JOIN modules m ON l.module_id = m.id 
WHERE m.course_id = 2 
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user U12DfRhAFBW6sMR.root --database LDLtnU3Ggjm84uQbZLmZ7C --execute SELECT l.id, l.title, m.title as module_title 
FROM lessons l 
JOIN modules m ON l.module_id = m.id 
WHERE m.course_id = 2 
LIMIT 20;
